text:
There was a small island surrounded by fog. The islanders were happy people. They spoke kindly amongst each other.

One day, a giant owl flew past. One brave islander climbed up the tallest tree.

The owl's eye holes stared down at the islander. The owl thought about eating him.

Instead, the owl said, "You know what? I smell berries." It took a bite.

Oh joy! They feasted all night long.
